topic: How fast visitors leave a slow-loading site
caption:
53% of people leave before your page even loads.
That's not a traffic problem. That's a slow website problem.
We build fast, clean sites for High Desert businesses.
DM us 'FAST' and we'll take a look at yours.

alt_text: Bold statistic graphic reading 53 percent of mobile visitors abandon a website that takes more than 3 seconds to load, branded for BuildMyWebNow.

copy.headline: of mobile visitors leave if a page takes 3+ seconds
copy.body: Google research found over half of mobile users abandon a site that takes longer than 3 seconds to load.
